name: Fruit Sweet and Sugar Free - Peach Oat Bran Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375 degrees. Lightly spray a regular size muffin tin with lecithin spray.
2. Toast the pecans in the oven for 7-10 minutes, stirring occasionally. Allow the nuts to cool.
3. Coarsely chop the pecans and peaches.
4. In a medium bowl, mix together:
- 1/2 cup Fruit sweetener
- 2 Eggs
- 1/2 cup Oil
- 1 tsp Vanilla extract
- 1 tsp Peach extract
- 1 1/4 cups Unsweetened applesauce
5. Sift the dry ingredients into a large bowl:
- 2 1/8 cups Brown rice flour
- 1/3 cup Oat flour
- 2 1/2 tsp Baking powder
- 1 tsp Baking soda
- 1/2 tsp Salt
- 2 tsp Cinnamon
- 1/2 tsp Nutmeg
6. Stir in the coarsely chopped pecans and date pieces.
7. Make a well in the center of the dry ingredients and stir in the wet mixture.
8. Add the coarsely chopped peaches to the batter. The muffin batter should be lumpy.
9. Use a #12 (1/2 cup) scoop to place the batter into the prepared muffin tins.
10. Bake the muffins in the preheated oven for 35-40 minutes.
11. Let the muffins cool in the muffin pans before removing them. Handle with care as they are fragile when warm.
